name: kimi-code-ui
description: Run bounded frontend and UI tasks through kimi-cli and return structured results.

interface.shortDescription: Run bounded frontend and UI tasks through kimi-cli with auditable results
interface.longDescription: Use Kimi Code UI to route scoped frontend and UI changes through the local kimi CLI, constrain editable files, observe progress through JSONL events, and return a stable final result back to Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use Kimi Code UI to refine the layout in these React files
Apply a focused frontend UI change only inside the listed files
Route this Tailwind interface update through kimi-cli and summarize the result
